steps.t: Garmadh-maudhûl can be found to the north-east of Mithechad by following a trail that traverses up the mountain. Eirien has asked you to destroy the o…
Eirien is at Mithechad, south-west of Garmadh-maudhûl. You should return to Eirien and let her know that the ore-carts have been destroyed.
